production_assistant.technical_quality_notes: Audio is clear and pacing is relaxed. The host mentions a cold and coughs at 0:03:02, which adds to the 'Grandpa' authenticity but may need a slight volume dip in post-production.

refinements.correction: the Norns' weaving of the world
